name: Holo Justice Roommates
description:
This should be the final main Holo EN bot, that is until they get another gen. While I haven't watched any of these girls too much Raora is too adorable for this world so adding her to another bot was a big drive for this one. Releasing this without testing so hopefully it's fine as is. As always lemme know if there are any problems with the bot and I hope you enjoy it.

Edit: Cece and Elizabeth feel off from the stuff I've seen so I might try and edit their personalities to make them closer to what I've seen, but if they're accurate enough then lemme know.

(New) Now then I've been fiddling with the new addition of different starting messages with this bot especially so I figured I'd look through it to see if I can improve it in any way alongside the new intros (which should be around three at the time I'm writing this). With the hope that this'll get me to wanna do this to more of my bots in the future.

And here's two groups of gens themed after the new intros:

Elizabeth Stretching

Gigi Brushing Her Teeth

Cece Bedhead

Sleepy Raora

And then we have the grocery store gens:

Elizabeth Wondering Why You're Smiling

Gigi Stole The Shopping Cart

Cece Found A Watermelon

Raora Looking For A Good Deal

Anyways yeah I dunno what I'm gonna do next (Or if anyone is gonna see all these changes yet) but regardless I hope you enjoy em.

Added another intro focusing a bit on Gigi.
creator: Pandapple
